steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The key signal: the passage connects “their dream remains unrealized” directly to facts about where maglev trains currently exist. These aren't contradictory ideas; the second clarifies the first.

steps.title: Apply the transition
steps.content: ”In fact,” connects the unrealized dream to evidence of why it's unrealized: maglev trains exist only in Asia, not the US. The other choices set up contradictions where none exist (C, D) or introduce an unrelated purpose (B). That matches choice A — A is correct.
